item.name: Platinum Hammerhead
item.description:
The apex predator of the lochs, this shark can be found skimming the depths in search of prey.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: With eyes on either side of its protruding head, this predator misses none of what happens deep in the loch. It rules its waters with a fist more iron than platinum, hunting down the prey it sets its bulging eyes upon to the very end.
